summary: Comprehensive testing of Electro Etalon e-commerce platform completed. All 30 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed - all pages load correctly, navigation works, admin panel accessible.

minor.issue: 404 errors in console for product images that don't exist (expected behavior for test data without images)

issues: Missing data-testid='theme-toggle' attribute on theme toggle button

action_items: Add data-testid='theme-toggle' to theme toggle button for better testability
Consider adding data-testid attributes to product cards for easier UI testing
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - proper separation of concerns with routes, models, services
Stock reservation logic in orders_routes.py is well implemented with atomic operations
OTP fallback to logging when RESEND_API_KEY is empty works correctly for testing
JWT auth and admin role protection working correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, navigation works, admin accessible)

test_credentials.note: Test accounts created during testing were cleaned up. To create new test accounts:
test_credentials.otp_retrieval: OTPs are logged to /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log when RESEND_API_KEY is empty

seed_data_creation: Test data was created during testing and cleaned up afterward. Database is empty as per requirements.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core functionality tested and working: Auth (OTP registration/login/reset), Categories CRUD, Products CRUD with stock management, Orders with stock reservation (reserve on create, decrement on confirm, release on cancel), Banners CRUD, Settings. Frontend pages all load correctly. Admin panel accessible after login with admin role.

backend: POST /api/auth/register/request-otp - sends OTP (logged when RESEND_API_KEY empty)
POST /api/auth/login - returns JWT for valid credentials
GET /api/auth/me - returns user info with valid JWT
Admin endpoints return 403 for non-admin users
Categories CRUD (create, list, update, reorder, delete)
Orders: create reserves stock, confirm decreases stock, cancel releases reservation
frontend: Homepage loads with hero/banner and features section
Catalog page shows products with category filter
Admin redirect to login when not authenticated
Admin panel accessible for admin users
Admin pages: Products, Categories, Banners, Orders, Settings all load
